parameters.formDescription: Upload a text-based PDF resume and paste a job description. Use sanitized data for public demos.

values.placeholder: Paste the complete job description here

values.formSubmittedText: Analysis completed. Inspect the final node output in n8n.

parameters.content:
## 1. Intake
The n8n form collects one PDF resume, a target role, and a complete job description.

## 2. Extraction and validation
PDF binary data becomes text. Invalid or too-short inputs fail before analysis.

## 3. Credential-free analysis
Transparent keyword and structure rules generate reproducible JSON and a Markdown report.
